Download.title: Download
Download.description: A record of a video download from TeraBox.

videoId.description: The unique ID of the video on TeraBox.

thumbnail.description: The URL of the video thumbnail.

size.description: The formatted size of the video file.

downloadUrl.description: The direct download URL for the selected quality.

downloadedAt.description: The timestamp when the download was initiated.

uid.description: The UID of the user who downloaded the video.
